td.fieldset:
{FULLNAME},
We hope that you are enjoying the 100 FREE UNITS to experiment with simplyFYI and to send customized payment confirmation emails.
You have {UNITS-BALANCE} FREE UNITS left.
Don't wait till you run out of FREE UNITS. To ensure continued delivery of your messages we recommend that you buy additional simplyFYI UNITS.
HOW TO PURCHASE UNITS Please login to simplyFYI.com and click "Topup UNITS" from the Control Panel to complete your purchase. It's that simple.
Questions? Contact us at support@simplyfyi.com.
Sincerely,
Team simplyFYI

div.style: font-family:Arial; font-size:10px; background-color:#fff; border:solid 1px #fff; padding:5px 0px 5px 0px; border-top:solid 1px #aaa;border-bottom:solid 1px #aaa; text-align:center

text-align:center;border-bottom-color:#C6C6C6; border-bottom-width:0px; border-bottom-style:dotted;FONT-WEIGHT: normal; FONT-SIZE: 12px; COLOR:rgb(0, 175, 227); FONT-STYLE: normal; FONT-FAMILY: arial;
